title: Verify multi-shelf implementation
description: Verify the implementation meets all requirements

implementResult.summary: Modified the cenlib-map dialog component to display all matching shelf locations when multiple mappings are found. Added five new methods/getters to the TypeScript component for handling multiple mappings with de-duplication. Updated the HTML template to conditionally show an intro text and comma-separated unique values for shelf labels, floors, and sections when multiple mappings exist. Added minimal SCSS styling for the multi-shelf intro text (italic, slightly darker color, no bottom border).
implementResult.templateChanges: Added conditional rendering for multiple shelf mappings: when hasMultipleMappings is true, displays intro text ('The item should be in one of these shelves:' / 'הפריט נמצא באחד מהמדפים הללו:') followed by comma-separated unique shelf labels. Section and floor rows now use the multi-value methods when multiple mappings exist. Single mapping behavior preserved with original display logic.

multiShelfText.en: The item should be in one of these shelves:
